description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a steep gable roof in dark gray, accented by a prominent red brick chimney emitting stylized smoke blocks. The exterior walls are painted blue with white trim, and the front features a covered porch supported by white columns, flanked by small brick planters. The windows are symmetrically arranged, with a large central window above the porch and smaller windows on the sides. The house sits on a green lawn with a white picket fence and a paved walkway leading to the front door. The side and rear views reveal additional windows and a continuation of the white fence, as well as a small garden area. The overall design is reminiscent of a Craftsman-style suburban home, with clean lines and a welcoming facade.
description: A blue and white single-story bungalow with a steep gable roof, red brick chimney, covered porch, and white picket fence on a green lawn. Symmetrical windows and brick planters enhance its Craftsman-style charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central door, large window above, red chimney, and brick planters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white picket fence, garden area, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gable end, additional windows, and the continuation of the fence and lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the chimney, side windows, and fenced garden area.
